ogTitle: Wurtulla vs Wuruma Dam: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wurtulla and Wuruma Dam.
heading: Wurtulla vs Wuruma Dam — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wurtulla, Queensland and Wuruma Dam, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wuruma Dam has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Wurtulla (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wurtulla or Wuruma Dam safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wurtulla has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Wuruma Dam scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wurtulla scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Wuruma Dam scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wurtulla or Wuruma Dam?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wuruma Dam has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
